item.title: Memes vol 437
item.description:
I hate this image- why didn’t he just swoop in and grab the child- Y’know with his gift of flight
I don’t believe in the death penalty because I think they deserve to live with what they’ve done
MY SPECIAL FLAG?!?! Yeah ok buddy
“Whoever thought of vanilla with meat?” MY BROTHER IN CHRIST IT WAS YOU!!!
God my boyfriend and I quote the “she’s a mother” at least 6 times a week
“Don’t you look pretty?” “GRRRRRR” Froggy and Liza Jane tax
Scruffy tax
Nessie tax
item.dc:creator: danat101

item.title: Love the ones you love
item.description: She’s out of the woods but it still scares me stiff, drink is my coping mechanism and have friends around me but needed a vent to the void… keep your loved ones close Imgur, much love x *edit* absolutely blown away by the love and support, I don’t often post stuff like this but when I do you guys step up… my internet family is the best ❤️
item.dc:creator: DingusMcGhee

item.title: I have too many memes: Dump #38
item.description: I’ve noticed my last few dumps have been getting a lot of dislikes/downvotes/whatever. Sorry to ask like this but is there something I did or am doing wrong? Would like to know thank you

item.dc:creator: MayMyEnemiesLiveLong

item.title: Nobody Stood.
item.description: A white woman, race educator Jane Elliot, says to an auditorium full of people, "I want every white person in this room who would be happy to be treated as this society, in general, treats our citizens -- our Black citizens -- if you, as a white person, would be happy to receive the same treatment that Black citizens do in this society, please stand." Nobody stands. After repeating the instruction, she says, "You know why you aren't standing. You know it's ugly, you know it's happening, and you don't want it for you. I want to know why you're so willing allow it for others."
item.dc:creator: SenorWombat

item.title: I am very worried about Healthcare CEO's right now.
item.description:
Kim Keck (Blue Cross)
Erhardt Preitauer (CareSource)
Lisa Erickson (Medica)
Joseph Zubretsky (Molina)
Andrew Witty (United Health Group - UHG)
David Cordani (Cigna)
Mark Bertolini (Previous Aetna CEO, now Oscar CEO)
Jim Rechtin (Humana)
J. David Joyner (CVS) Specifically these ones. Please be very safe out there everyone!

item.title: 250lb vs 125lb Woman's Visceral fat comparison
item.description: Visceral fat is a type of body fat that lies deep within your abdominal walls and surrounds your organs. Some levels of visceral fat are healthy and help protect your organs. However, too much visceral fat can be dangerous for your health. Visceral fat is sometimes called “active fat” because it plays an active role in how your body functions. Too much visceral fat can lead to serious health issues such as diabetes, heart disease and stroke. Visceral fat is intra-abdominal fat, meaning the body stores it deep in the abdominal cavity. It surrounds and affects organs such as the liver, pancreas, intestines, and stomach. It is an independent risk factor for cardiovascular and metabolic mortality and morbidity.
item.dc:creator: SweepTheLeg31
